name: encounter-item
title: Encounter Item
description: One visit/encounter as a self-contained row — a type-tinted icon chip with a Tooltip, reason, provider · location · date meta, a status badge, and an optional summary.

props.name: title
props.description: Encounter reason; falls back to the type label.

clinicalNotes: Encounter type is encoded by a consistent icon + tint (ED=destructive, lab/immunization=success, inpatient=info…) with the type name always available on hover, so a history is scannable by care setting. Cancelled encounters are struck + dimmed but retained for the record. The same type taxonomy maps directly onto the Timeline marker colors, so an EncounterItem list and an EncounterTimelinePanel stay visually consistent.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Feeds EncounterTimelinePanel (M2) and the Patient Chart block.
